name: Might of the Seraphs
description: A Seraph Eridian relic built for melee-focused characters, combining a melee damage boost with faster recharge for melee override skills. It is especially useful on characters who rely on those override attacks as part of their combat loop.
notes:
It is bought from the Seraph Vendor in the Badass Crater of Badassitude.

A level 61 purple Strength Relic can match the stat boost of a level 50 Might of the Seraphs, but at equal level this relic is stronger. Its tagline nods to the classic "unstoppable force" versus "immovable object" paradox.

special.description: Boosts melee damage and speeds up the cooldown of melee override skills such as Hellfire Halitosis, Scorn, and Fistful of Hurt.
special.title: Become the unstoppable force!
